name: Woes of the White Forest
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>白</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しろ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>き<ruby lang="jp"><rb>森</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のわざわいなり
desc: Special Summon 1 "White Forest" monster from your hand or Deck, then immediately after this effect resolves, you can Synchro Summon 1 "White Forest" Synchro Monster. If this card is sent to the GY to activate a monster effect: You can Set this card. You can only use each effect of "Woes of the White Forest" once per turn.
eff: Special Summon 1 "White Forest" monster from your hand or Deck, then immediately after this effect resolves, you can Synchro Summon 1 "White Forest" Synchro Monster. If this card is sent to the GY to activate a monster effect: You can Set this card. You can only use each effect of "Woes of the White Forest" once per turn.

action: Activates if sent to the Graveyard for cost
